## Summary

Describe the catalog validation, search, lifecycle, export, test, or documentation change.

## Metadata impact

- Affected record fields:
- Category or status vocabulary impact:
- Source-review impact:
- Compatibility impact:

## Verification

- [ ] Added synthetic catalog fixtures
- [ ] Ran `python -m unittest -v`
- [ ] Checked required-field validation
- [ ] Checked duplicate identifier behavior
- [ ] Checked search and filters when relevant
- [ ] Checked JSON, CSV, or Markdown exports when relevant
- [ ] Confirmed internal fields are not exposed in clean exports

## Source and lifecycle review

- [ ] Declared terms remain separate from review conclusions
- [ ] Source references are preserved when available
- [ ] Status changes include a reason
- [ ] Replacement records include a replacement identifier
- [ ] No source dataset content or private information was added

## Documentation

- [ ] Updated README or field reference
- [ ] Updated category or source-review guidance when needed
- [ ] Recorded user-visible behavior changes

## Reviewer notes

List source uncertainty, vocabulary changes, migration needs, and follow-up work.
